message:
fix(core): add missing now_ms helper and fix scheduler test timing race

- fleet_launcher.rs: add now_ms() helper in test module to fix E0425
  compile error blocking all lib test builds
- swarm_scheduler.rs: fix evaluate_reclaims_before_assigning timing
  race — reclaim_timed_out uses wall-clock time, not simulated time;
  switch to heartbeat_timeout_ms=0 with 2ms sleep for determinism

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
